title: Arabic Around the World Day
story: Every December 18, people celebrate National Arabic Language Day to honor one of the world's most spoken languages! Arabic is used by over 400 million people across many countries. On this special day, schools teach Arabic words, libraries display Arabic books, and cultural centers host storytelling sessions. People share beautiful Arabic calligraphy on social media and learn fun phrases like "marhaba" which means hello.
activity_question: What does the Arabic word "marhaba" mean?
follow_up_question: What Arabic words or phrases would you like to learn first?
